task:
Write a complete Next.js 16 Server Component at app/design-1/_components/About.tsx that renders the IRON design's About-the-coach section. Output ONLY the .tsx file contents — no markdown fences, no explanation, no preamble. === AVAILABLE TAILWIND TOKENS === Colors: bg-iron-bg #0e0e0e, bg-iron-panel #171717, bg-iron-card #1d1d1d, border-iron-line #2a2a2a, text-iron-paper / text-iron-text #f4f0e8, text-iron-text-dim #9a958c, text-iron-text-muted #5e5b54, bg-iron-orange / text-iron-orange #ff5b1f, border-iron-orange. Fonts: font-iron-display (Archivo Black), font-iron-body (Archivo), font-iron-mono (JetBrains Mono). === AVAILABLE COMPONENTS === import Image from 'next/image'; import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow'; // === CONTENT — render verbatim === Heading (font-iron-display, ~text-5xl/6xl, leading-none, tracking-tight): Six years coaching. One question first: what do you want? Paragraph 1 (text-iron-text-dim, text-lg, leading-relaxed): I'm not the loudest coach in town and I'm not trying to be. I built NLY/Fit out of a two-car garage in 2019 because the big gyms felt like factories — programs that didn't fit, coaches who didn't know your name. Paragraph 2 (same style, gap-4 between paragraphs): We do it differently here. Real movement. Real progressions. We meet you where you are — first lift or thousandth — and we don't move on until it actually works. Floating credential tag (absolute, bottom-5 left -5 of image, bg-iron-bg, border border-iron-orange, font-iron-mono text-[11px] tracking-[0.16em] text-iron-orange, px-5 py-3): COACH · NSCA-CPT · PN-1 Credentials grid (3 columns, mt-11, border-t border-iron-line): ['NSCA', 'Certified Personal Trainer'] ['PN-1', 'Precision Nutrition L1'] ['USAW', 'Sports Performance Coach'] Each cell: py-6, border-r border-iron-line (except last), the code (NSCA/PN-1/USAW) in font-iron-display text-2xl text-iron-text, the description below in font-iron-mono text-[11px] text-iron-text-dim tracking-[0.08em] uppercase mt-1.5. === STRUCTURE === Section: border-b border-iron-line, px-6 py-16 lg:px-14 lg:py-[110px]. Inner grid: grid lg:grid-cols-[1fr_1.1fr] gap-16 (smaller on mobile, stack). Left column: relative. Image container has aspect-[4/5] border border-iron-line. next/image with src https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583468982228-19f19164aee2?w=1400&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop, fill, sizes='(max-width:1024px) 100vw, 45vw', object-cover, alt 'Portrait of the NLY/Fit coach in the garage gym.' The floating credential tag is absolutely positioned over the bottom-left. Right column: , then h2 heading, then div.flex.flex-col.gap-4 of two

paragraphs, then the credentials grid below. === CONSTRAINTS === - Server Component (no 'use client'). - Use ONLY the imports listed and Tailwind utilities + iron-* tokens. - Semantic HTML (section, h2, p). Image must have descriptive alt. - Output ONLY the .tsx file contents.
